survey_description: Your responses are anonymous. This takes about 3 minutes.

questions.text: I feel engaged and motivated by my daily work responsibilities.
questions.label: Engagement & motivation

questions.text: I receive useful feedback that helps me grow professionally.
questions.label: Feedback quality

questions.text: My workload is manageable and sustainable.
questions.label: Workload manageability

questions.text: My contributions are recognized and appreciated.
questions.label: Recognition

questions.text: What is one specific change that would most improve your engagement or satisfaction?
questions.label: Improvement suggestion
